post.content:
During my coding round, I was asked one of Uber's most frequently asked problem (LC HARD), which isn't included in Amazon's list of problems from the past year.

Bro just say before the interview that you are not gonna select.
PS: The interview got rescheduled two times

Bro, if you gonna gate keep the question, might as well delete this post. \n\nAnyway, yeah, I heard great things about Amazon interview process but they have rescheduled mine 2 times so far. I just decided to keep my hope low.
can you please share the question?
You posted an amazon interview in an uber discussion and then you gatekept the question.\njust...why?
